name: IoT Sensor Failure Alert
description: Monitors IoT sensor health: triggers on connectivity loss (>15 min silence) or temperature out of safe range (>35°C or <2°C for refrigeration units)

dataSource.query: let connectivity_threshold = 15m; let temp_high = 35.0; let temp_low = 2.0; let connectivity_failures = IoTSensorReadings | summarize LastReading = max(Timestamp) by SensorId, StoreId, SensorType | where (now() - LastReading) > connectivity_threshold | extend AlertType = 'connectivity_loss', Priority = 'medium', Reading = toreal(0), Threshold = toreal(0); let temperature_failures = IoTSensorReadings | where SensorType == 'refrigeration' and Timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize AvgTemp = avg(Temperature), MaxTemp = max(Temperature), MinTemp = min(Temperature) by SensorId, StoreId, SensorType | where MaxTemp > temp_high or MinTemp < temp_low | extend AlertType = iff(MaxTemp > temp_high, 'temperature_high', 'temperature_low'), Priority = 'critical', Reading = iff(MaxTemp > temp_high, MaxTemp, MinTemp), Threshold = iff(MaxTemp > temp_high, temp_high, temp_low); connectivity_failures | union temperature_failures | project SensorId, StoreId, SensorType, AlertType, Priority, Reading, Threshold

actions.subject: {{#if (eq Priority 'critical')}}🚨{{else}}⚠️{{/if}} IoT Alert [{{Priority}}]: {{AlertType}} — Sensor {{SensorId}} at Store {{StoreId}}

actions.message: {{#if (eq Priority 'critical')}}🚨 CRITICAL{{else}}⚠️ MEDIUM{{/if}} | IoT {{AlertType}} | Sensor {{SensorId}} at Store {{StoreId}} | {{SensorType}} | Reading: {{Reading}} / Threshold: {{Threshold}}

parameters.description: IoT sensor {{SensorId}} at store {{StoreId}} raised a {{Priority}} {{AlertType}} alert. Reading: {{Reading}}, Threshold: {{Threshold}}.
